seoTitle: Martin vs Marvel Loch — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Martin and Marvel Loch. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Martin vs Marvel Loch: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Martin and Marvel Loch.
heading: Martin vs Marvel Loch — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Martin, Western Australia and Marvel Loch, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Martin has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Marvel Loch (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Martin or Marvel Loch safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Martin has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Marvel Loch scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Martin scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Marvel Loch scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Martin or Marvel Loch?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Martin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
